description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a mix of brick and white plaster exterior finishes. The structure includes a main entrance with a small porch, several large windows, and a flat roof. The front yard and backyard are covered with green lawns, while paved walkways and driveways provide access around the house. The building layout is compact, with visible interior rooms and open spaces, including what appears to be a living area and bedrooms. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, and the property is enclosed for privacy and security.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with brick and white plaster walls, flat roof, large windows, and green lawns enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, large windows, and green lawn with paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall sections, side windows, and the expanse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying grouped windows, back entrance, and the paved backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible side entrance, windows, and a clear view of the boundary wall and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
